productDisplayName: Carlton London Women Casual Gold Sandals
description: The perfect way to complement your ethnic wear is to slip into these beautifully crafted sandals from carlton london. The midfoot strap embellished with rhinestones adds that extra spark to your personality. Team it with ethnic or fusion wear and you're all set to rule the party.UpperMidfoot length strap with a toe separator and adjustable backfoot buckle to lock the foot in placeSoft, glittery footbed for all-day comfort and styleOutsoleTextured durable rubber outsole with a floral groove on the forefoot for absolute grip and tractionSandal careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
